requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — 220 V / 50 Hz, Type C/E Plug (IEC 62368-1 / NM equivalent)
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全——220V/50Hz，C/E型插头（IEC 62368-1 / NM等效标准）
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全——220V/50Hz，C/E型插頭（IEC 62368-1 / NM等效標準）

summary.en: Morocco operates on 220 V / 50 Hz with Type C and Type E plugs (European continental standard, same as France). Electrical safety for audio/video, information technology, and communication equipment must conform to IEC 62368-1 or the applicable IMANOR NM equivalent. Products designed for Chinese market voltage (220 V nominal) are electrically compatible, but plug type must be C/E (not the Chinese flat-pin Type A/I). Safety test reports must reference IEC 62368-1 or the applicable NM standard and be from a recognised laboratory.
summary.zh: 摩洛哥电网电压为220V/50Hz，采用C型和E型插头（欧洲大陆标准，与法国相同）。音视频、信息技术及通信设备的电气安全须符合IEC 62368-1或适用的IMANOR NM等效标准。专为中国市场设计的产品（额定220V）在电压上具有兼容性，但插头须为C/E型（而非中国扁脚A/I型）。安全测试报告须引用IEC 62368-1或适用NM标准，并由认可实验室出具。
summary.zht: 摩洛哥電網電壓為220V/50Hz，採用C型和E型插頭（歐洲大陸標準，與法國相同）。音視頻、資訊技術及通訊設備的電氣安全須符合IEC 62368-1或適用的IMANOR NM等效標準。專為中國市場設計的產品（額定220V）在電壓上具有相容性，但插頭須為C/E型（而非中國扁腳A/I型）。安全測試報告須引用IEC 62368-1或適用NM標準，並由認可實驗室出具。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62368-1 (Audio/video, information and communication technology equipment — Safety requirements) — referenced as technical basis for NM equivalent
IMANOR NM standards equivalent to IEC 62368-1
Plug / socket standard: Type C (CEE 7/16) and Type E (CEE 7/5) — European continental

summary.en: China requires CCC certification to GB 4943.1 (equivalent to IEC 60950-1, now transitioning to GB 4943.1-2022 aligned with IEC 62368-1) for information technology and audio/video equipment. China mains supply is 220 V / 50 Hz. Chinese plug type is Type A (two flat parallel pins) or Type I (three flat pins at angles), which are not compatible with Moroccan Type C/E sockets.
summary.zh: 中国对信息技术及音视频设备要求执行GB 4943.1（等效于IEC 60950-1，现正向与IEC 62368-1对接的GB 4943.1-2022过渡）并取得CCC认证。中国电网电压为220V/50Hz。中国插头为A型（两扁平行插脚）或I型（三扁角插脚），与摩洛哥C/E型插座不兼容。
summary.zht: 中國對資訊技術及音視頻設備要求執行GB 4943.1（等效於IEC 60950-1，現正向與IEC 62368-1對接的GB 4943.1-2022過渡）並取得CCC認證。中國電網電壓為220V/50Hz。中國插頭為A型（兩扁平行插腳）或I型（三扁角插腳），與摩洛哥C/E型插座不相容。

standards_or_laws: GB 4943.1 / GB 4943.1-2022 (Safety of information technology equipment — equivalent to IEC 60950-1 / IEC 62368-1)
CCC (China Compulsory Certification) for information technology and audio/video equipment
Chinese plug: Type A (GB 2099.1 flat-pin) or Type I — not compatible with Moroccan Type C/E

gap.en: Voltage (220 V / 50 Hz) is the same in Morocco and China, so no voltage conversion is needed for products designed for the Chinese market. However, the plug type must be changed from Chinese Type A/I to European Type C/E for Moroccan sockets. Safety test reports must reference IEC 62368-1 or the Moroccan NM equivalent — China CCC to GB 4943.1 does not satisfy Moroccan requirements directly and new test reports from an IEC 62368-1-accredited laboratory are expected.
gap.zh: 摩洛哥与中国电网电压相同（均为220V/50Hz），因此面向中国市场设计的产品无需变压。但插头须从中国A/I型更换为摩洛哥C/E型欧式插头。安全测试报告须引用IEC 62368-1或摩洛哥NM等效标准——中国GB 4943.1的CCC认证不直接满足摩洛哥要求，须提供来自IEC 62368-1认可实验室的新测试报告。
gap.zht: 摩洛哥與中國電網電壓相同（均為220V/50Hz），因此面向中國市場設計的產品無需變壓。但插頭須從中國A/I型更換為摩洛哥C/E型歐式插頭。安全測試報告須引用IEC 62368-1或摩洛哥NM等效標準——中國GB 4943.1的CCC認證不直接滿足摩洛哥要求，須提供來自IEC 62368-1認可實驗室的新測試報告。

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] China CCC to GB 4943.1 does not satisfy Moroccan electrical safety requirements. IEC 62368-1 (or NM equivalent) test reports from a recognised laboratory are required. Plug type must be changed from Chinese Type A/I to European Type C/E; mains voltage (220 V / 50 Hz) is compatible.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB 4943.1的CCC认证不满足摩洛哥电气安全要求。须提供来自认可实验室的IEC 62368-1（或NM等效标准）测试报告。插头须从中国A/I型更换为欧式C/E型；电网电压（220V/50Hz）兼容。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB 4943.1的CCC認證不滿足摩洛哥電氣安全要求。須提供來自認可實驗室的IEC 62368-1（或NM等效標準）測試報告。插頭須從中國A/I型更換為歐式C/E型；電網電壓（220V/50Hz）相容。
